page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc6.16xlarge is a compute-optimized server instance designed for high-density parallel processing. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration features 64 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, operating at a base frequency of 3.1 GHz. System memory totals 128.0 GB, yielding a 2.0 GB per core ratio. This instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware, relying entirely on network-attached storage and baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps.

Benchmark evaluations indicate strong multi-core CPU performance, with stress-ng multi-core tests and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression placing in the top tier of results. Large-block read-only memory bandwidth and database operations also demonstrate strong performance. Conversely, single-core CPU performance, memory write speeds, and static web serving throughput fall into the average range. Due to the lack of hardware accelerators, LLM text generation speeds are weak, though prompt processing speeds remain average.

The qualitative cost profile of this instance is defined by its high compute-to-memory density, allowing users to run CPU-heavy tasks without paying for unneeded memory capacity. The dedicated core allocation ensures consistent execution times free from hypervisor-induced resource contention. This hardware profile is highly suitable for multi-threaded applications, software compilation, database operations, and high-throughput network tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc6.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor with 64 dedicated physical cores running at 3.1 GHz. It features 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, and offers a 20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. The instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators. Benchmark data highlights strong multi-core CPU performance, robust multi-threaded decompression, and highly efficient database operations, while single-core execution and memory write speeds remain average. Due to its high compute density and strong parallel processing capabilities, this instance is well-suited for multi-threaded applications, software compilation, and database workloads that require dedicated CPU resources without massive memory overhead.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc6.16xlarge is a compute-optimized server featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 128 GB RAM, and 20 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong multi-core and database performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc6.16xlarge is a compute-optimized server with 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 128 GB RAM, and 20 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A high-density, compute-optimized server featuring sixty-four dedicated cores for demanding multi-threaded workloads and database operations.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY physical cores running at 3.1 GHz
128 GB of system memory with a compute-optimized 1:2 ratio
20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput networking
Strong multi-core CPU and multi-threaded decompression performance
Best suited for database operations, software compilation, and parallel processing
